steps.title: Set up the total weight constraint
steps.content:
The elevator carries:
  • The person: 180 pounds
  • The boxes: $24x + 58y$ pounds
Since 4,920 is the maximum capacity:
$$180 + 24x + 58y \leq 4,920$$

steps.title: Simplify and identify the inequality
steps.content:
Subtract 180 from both sides to isolate the box weight:
$$24x + 58y \leq 4,920 - 180$$
$$24x + 58y \leq 4,740$$
That confirms B is correct.
